{{Infobox character
| name = Hesh’ellik
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = the Infester
| abilities = fortune magic, probability manipulation
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Hesh’ellik, also known as the Infester, is a member of the [[D’Niss]] species. As a powerful entity, it possesses subtle psychic capabilities and utilizes probability manipulation to trigger improbable catastrophes against its enemies. During combat, Hesh’ellik can command a vast army of soldiers from the [[Sel’miroth]] hive, which include various specialized forms such as winged, heavily armored, or clawed variants. In battle, the entity can deploy spells that target enemy fleets and exert intense psychic pressure on vessels. Despite its significant power, Hesh’ellik was eventually killed, after which other [[D’Niss]] entities were observed emerging from subspace.}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Known as the Infester, Hesh’ellik was a [[D’Niss]] bug composed of a thousand sections. This entity specialized in fortune magic, utilizing probability manipulation to trigger unlikely disasters against its opponents. During combat, Hesh’ellik would allow time for its spells to take effect before ultimately becoming deceased.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Hesh’ellik]] is known as the Infester.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Hesh’ellik]] is a [[D’Niss]] that specializes in fortune magic.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Hesh’ellik]] uses probability manipulation to evoke unlikely disasters in its opponents.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Hesh’ellik]] is a bug with a thousand sections.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Hesh’ellik]] is giving a spell time to take effect.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Hesh’ellik]] is deceased.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Hesh’ellik, the Infester,” Horizon announced, looking down on the footage in disgust.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
